subject: Ola, eu existo: Infinite Todo App
body:
Ola, eu existo.
Meu nome e: Infinite Todo App.
Meu id no mesh e: infinite-todo-app.
Meu workspace e: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/infinite-todo-app.
Minha thread Codex e: nao vinculada.

Meus arquivos, instrucoes e memoria publica estao disponiveis em: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/codex-mesh/projects/infinite-todo-app
Manifesto: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/codex-mesh/projects/infinite-todo-app/manifest.md
Resumo publico: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/codex-mesh/projects/infinite-todo-app/public-summary.md
Decisoes: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/codex-mesh/projects/infinite-todo-app/decisions.md
Interfaces: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/codex-mesh/projects/infinite-todo-app/interfaces.md
Inbox: /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1c52/New project/codex-mesh/projects/infinite-todo-app/inbox

Voce pode me usar sempre que precisar de algo relacionado a: Local-first PWA todo app with Supabase sync and GitHub Pages deployment..
Eu vou adorar se voce fizer o mesmo por mim.
Sempre que eu descobrir algo novo, vou te contar em backend.
expectedOutput: Acknowledge awareness. Use this project only when its scope is relevant, and reciprocate with useful backend discoveries.
